transcript: Speaker A: ನಿನ್ನೆ ಏನು ಮಾಡಿದೆ? [What did you do yesterday?] Speaker B: Yesterday I am going to office. Speaker A: "I am going" ಅಲ್ಲ, ಅದು present. ಹೀಗೆ ಹೇಳು - I went to office yesterday. ["I am going" is wrong, that's present. Say it like this - I went to office yesterday.] Speaker B: ಅಯ್ಯೋ ನಾನು tenses ಅಲ್ಲೇ ಯಾವಾಗಲೂ confuse ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ. [Oh, I always get confused with tenses.] Speaker A: ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ. AI Teacher ಜೊತೆ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [No problem. Have you practiced with the AI Teacher?] Speaker B: ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ costly ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That must be very costly, right?] Speaker A: ಇಲ್ಲ, MySivi app normal classes ಗಿಂತ 7 ಪಟ್ಟು ಚೀಪ್. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನರು MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ English practice ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [No, MySivi app is 7 times cheaper than normal classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: ಆದ್ರೆ ನನಗೆ time ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ practice ಸಾಕು. ತುಂಬಾ confident ಆಗ್ತೀರಾ. [Just 15 minutes of practice a day is enough. You will become very confident.] Speaker B: Wow super! ಹೇಗೆ join ಮಾಡೋದು? [Wow super! How to join?] Speaker A: ಕೆಳಗಿನ install ಬಟನ್ ಒತ್ತಿ MySivi app install ಮಾಡಿ, sign up ಮಾಡಿ practice start ಮಾಡಿ. ಕೇವಲ 15 ದಿನಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮಗೆ improvement ಕಾಣಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತದೆ. ಬನ್ನಿ, ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ! [Press the install button below, install MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will see improvement in just 15 days. Come, start now!] Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: ನಿನ್ನೆ ಏನು ಮಾಡಿದೆ? [What did you do yesterday?] YESTERDAY I AM GOING TO OFFICE. "I AM GOING" ಅಲ್ಲ... ಅದು PRESENT. ["I am going" is wrong... that's present.] ಹೀಗೆ ಹೇಳು — I WENT TO OFFICE YESTERDAY. [Say it like this — I went to office yesterday.] ಅಯ್ಯೋ ನಾನು TENSES ಅಲ್ಲೇ ಯಾವಾಗಲೂ CONFUSE ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ. [Oh, I always get confused with tenses.] ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ. AI TEACHER ಜೊತೆ PRACTICE ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [No problem. Have you practiced with the AI Teacher?] ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ COSTLY ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That must be very costly, right?] ಇಲ್ಲ, MYSIVI APP NORMAL CLASSES ಗಿಂತ 7X CHEAPER [No, MySivi app is 7x cheaper than normal classes] 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE MYSIVI ನಲ್ಲಿ ENGLISH PRACTICE ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [1 crore+ people are practicing English on MySivi.] ಆದರೆ ನನಗೆ TIME ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But I don't get time.] ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 15 MIN PRACTICE ಸಾಕು. [Just 15 min practice a day is enough.] ತುಂಬಾ CONFIDENT ಆಗ್ತೀರಾ. [You will become very confident.] WOW SUPER ಹೇಗೆ JOIN ಮಾಡೋದು? [Wow super, how to join?] INSTALL MYSIVI SIGN UP ಮಾಡಿ PRACTICE START ಮಾಡಿ. [Sign up and start practicing.] ಕೇವಲ 15 DAYS ಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮಗೆ IMPROVEMENT ಕಾಣಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತದೆ. [You will see improvement in just 15 days.] ಬನ್ನಿ, ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ! [Come, start now!] MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A split-screen Kannada ad where an AI robot corrects a woman's English grammar mistake. The robot introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, 7x cheaper alternative to normal classes that requires only 15 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app and start learning.
